title: Cozy Living Room Decor with Textured Fabrics and Personalized Items
description: Close-up of a cozy living room corner featuring wooden shelves with textured knitted blanket, ceramic mug, amber candle, green potted plant, stacked books, a small brass elephant figurine, and a framed abstract art print. The warm, neutral tones and natural lighting highlight the inviting and personalized interior design aesthetic.
